{"problem_standardized_math":"Implement the trust-region method based on Algorithm 7.2, taking $B_k$ to be the exact Hessian, and use it to minimize\n\\[\nf(x)=\\sum_{i=1}^n \\left[(1-x_{2i-1})^2+10(x_{2i}-x_{2i-1}^2)^2\\right].\n\\]\nCarry out the computation with $n=10$, experimenting with the starting point and with the stopping test for the CG iteration. Then repeat the computation with $n=50$. At every iteration, your program should report whether Algorithm 7.2 encountered negative curvature, reached the trust-region boundary, or satisfied the stopping test."}
